title: Antipsychotic First vs Second Generation
description: Per-drug sex bias profiles for 1st gen (haloperidol, chlorpromazine) vs 2nd gen (risperidone, olanzapine, quetiapine, aripiprazole, clozapine)

antipsychotic_vs_baseline.interpretation: Antipsychotics show significantly different sex bias than overall

top_10_female_biased.adverse_event: Loss of personal independence in daily activities

top_10_male_biased.adverse_event: Product administered to patient of inappropriate age
